message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Ignore reproduce_*.ts debug/reproduction scripts that are created
during debugging sessions and shouldn't be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,3 +75,6 @@ Chrome_*.png
 
 # HTML export drafts
 world_class_export.html
+
+# Debug/reproduction scripts (ephemeral)
+reproduce_*.ts
